raw.subject: Your South Bend page caught my eye
raw.body:
Hi,

I love seeing how The Elder Bread is embracing the changing seasons. Your post about growing alongside it really stood out to me - it's great to see a local business that's so connected to its community.

But I noticed you don't have your own website yet, which is a missed opportunity to showcase your menu and hours to customers who are searching online. With a website, you could reach more people and drive more bookings during your busy hours.

I took some inspiration from your Facebook photos and posts to create a simple homepage idea. It includes a menu hero, hours block, photo gallery, and map & directions - all designed to make it easy for customers to find and visit your restaurant.

https://sites.damianbasilio.dev/preview/the-elder-bread-south-bend

If you're interested in making your online presence as warm and inviting as your bakery, I'd be happy to discuss a straightforward project with a flat fee for local businesses. Just reply to this email or let's schedule a quick call to explore further.
